name: Fusilli with Olives and Cauliflower
recipeIngredient: 1 pound cauliflower (cut into florets with the stalks)
1/2 cup extra virgin olive oil (divided into 4 tablespoons plus 4 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fusilli according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Steam the cauliflower florets and stalks until tender, about 5-7 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, toss the cooked fusilli with half of the olive oil, reserving some for serving.
4. Add the steamed cauliflower to the pasta and mix well.
5. Serve hot, garnished with additional olive oil if desired.
